edits.rationale: AIQS 5.4.4 was not found in v2 and no similar replacement clause was identified. The clause may have been deprecated — human review required.
edits.old_text: This WI applies to all personnel involved in quality assurance and problem-solving activities within the manufacturing plant. It encompasses all equipment, including the Coordinate Measuring Machine (Asset ID: 2847.510.0007) and the Hydraulic Press, 12-ton (Asset ID: 2847.420.0018), and aligns with AIQS 5.4.4 and AIQS 4.2.2.

edits.rationale: Equipment ID 2847.420.0018 has been superseded by 2847.420.0019 in v2.

edits.rationale: AIQS 5.4.4 was not found in v2 and no similar replacement clause was identified. The clause may have been deprecated — human review required.
edits.old_text: 2. **Assemble the Team**: Gather a cross-functional team with knowledge of the process and equipment involved. Ensure that team members understand the importance of the RCA process as outlined in AIQS 5.4.4.
